name: mpy-marketplace
description: Claude Code plugins for MicroPython development workflows

plugins.name: mpy-pr-triage
plugins.description: List, sort, and triage open MicroPython PRs with branch and worktree status

plugins.description: MicroPython project rules, multi-agent review skill, and documentation style guide for any MicroPython repo

plugins.description: Systematic maintenance workflow for open MicroPython PRs: recon, rebase, CI, push

plugins.name: draft-pr
plugins.description: Draft GitHub PR and GitLab MR titles and descriptions from git branch changes

plugins.name: mpy-reviewer
plugins.description: MicroPython code review assistant backed by categorized review comments from upstream

plugins.name: mpy-triage
plugins.description: MicroPython issue/PR triage - duplicate and related item detection
